howItWorks.intro: This pet insurance calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Premium varies by age, breed size, and coverage level
howItWorks.outro: Insurance rates depend on many individual factors. Get personalized quotes from licensed providers.

faq.question: Is pet insurance worth it?
faq.answer: If your pet needs emergency surgery ($3,000-$10,000+), insurance pays for itself immediately. On average, 1 in 3 pets needs emergency treatment each year. It provides peace of mind and prevents financial-based medical decisions.

faq.question: What does pet insurance cover?
faq.answer: Accident and illness plans cover injuries, diseases, surgeries, and medications. Comprehensive plans add wellness visits, vaccinations, and dental. Pre-existing conditions are never covered.

faq.question: When should I get pet insurance?
faq.answer: As early as possible — premiums are lowest for young, healthy pets. Conditions that develop before enrollment become pre-existing and are excluded permanently.

faq.question: How does reimbursement work?
faq.answer: You pay the vet bill, submit a claim, and get reimbursed (typically 70-90% after deductible). Some newer plans offer direct vet payment.

faq.question: Is the Pet Insurance Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Pet Insurance Calculator?
sections.body: The Pet Insurance Calculator is a free online tool designed for individuals and families who need quick, accurate calculations in the insurance planning space. By entering your pet age, size, expected annual vet costs, you get instant results including est. monthly premium, est. annual premium, break-even vet bill. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting est. monthly premium right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In insurance planning, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by individuals and families worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to choose the right coverage with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your pet age and need to find the right est. monthly premium. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Pet Age (years)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your pet age — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: size, expected annual vet costs, coverage level. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your est. monthly premium, est. annual premium, break-even vet bill. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your pet age before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
